item.title: Usage
item.description: Getting started with UnisonUI Running UnisonUI Docker docker pull unisonui/unisonui docker run -p 8080:8080 unisonui/unisonui More information about configuring UnisonUI can be found here. In addition to the previous configuration method you can use variable environments in order to configure it. For that take the path, uppercase it and replace the . and - respectively by _ and __. docker run -p 8081:8081 -e UNISONUI_HTTP_PORT=8081 unisonui/unisonui Binary WARNING: UnisonUI requires Java 11+ in order to run.

item.title: Configuration
item.description: Global configuration UnisonUI uses HOCON configuration files. HOCON is a superset of JSON and a mix of JAVA properties. Default configuration unisonui { // Provide UnisonUI specification inside UnisonUI self-specification = no // List of enabled providers (all by default) providers = [ "tech.unisonui.providers.GitProvider", "tech.unisonui.providers.ContainerProvider", "tech.unisonui.providers.WebhookProvider" ] http { port = 8080 // Port of the Webserver interface = "0.0.0.0" // Interface where the webserver listen to statics-path="" // Path where static files (webapp) reside } // For more information about each provider configuration.

item.title: v1.0.0
item.description: v1.0.0 (2021-03-12) 🪲 Bug Fixes 🐛 configuration file wasn’t detecting changes properly (#244) (17abb1ba) 👻 Code Refactoring 💡 rename packages and references to them (1e3cad4a) ✨ Features 🎸 merge docker and kubernetes provider (#333) (b326289e) 🎸 add a dark mode (c942a7d7) 🎸 move out the statics from the jar (e35e0a82) 🎸 configure the logging output of the docker image (86f006b0) 🎸 support gRPC specification (d474f151) 🔧 Build deps-dev: bump copy-webpack-plugin from 6.

item.title: Git provider
item.description: Git provider How does it work The git provider is used to retrieve specification files from git repositories. Each repositories are cloned then pulled at regular interval (cache-duration). The repositories can be set manually or be discovered from Github. Prerequisite This provider requires git to be available on the host. Also if you are intending to use Protobuf specification files, you need to have protoc available. If you are using the docker image, there is no need to install them.

item.title: v0.8.0
item.description: v0.8.0 (2020-09-29) 🪲 Bug Fixes 🐛 restore css is prod mode (058eb6b8) 🐛 detect removed files from the restui list with git (4d036ad1) 🐛 themes had a weird behaviour (8c7d0b2a) 🐛 purgecss removed the css (ce994ca2) 🐛 fix swagger ui react bug (553c99dc) 🐛 env var not resolved properly (89bf64c6) 👻 Code Refactoring 💡 correct some warning (4606f2c1) ✨ Features 🎸 enable disable proxy from config (266c8f0e) 🎸 automatically reload the page when the content change (807837c4) 🎸 allow specific service name per file with git (#183) (37c2fa19) 🔧 Build deps-dev: bump eslint from 7.

item.title: v0.7.1
item.description: v0.7.1 (2020-09-24) 🪲 Bug Fixes 🐛 detect removed files from the restui list with git (4d036ad1) 🐛 themes had a weird behaviour (8c7d0b2a) 🐛 purgecss removed the css (ce994ca2) 🐛 fix swagger ui react bug (553c99dc) 🐛 env var not resolved properly (89bf64c6) 👻 Code Refactoring 💡 correct some warning (4606f2c1) ✨ Features 🎸 automatically reload the page when the content change (807837c4) 🎸 allow specific service name per file with git (#183) (37c2fa19) 🔧 Build deps-dev: bump @fullhuman/postcss-purgecss in /rest-ui (#201) (b8521a1c) deps-dev: bump html-webpack-plugin in /rest-ui (#202) (369d57ed) deps-dev: bump compression-webpack-plugin in /rest-ui (#203) (c7a14f06) deps-dev: bump eslint-plugin-react in /rest-ui (#204) (3e40a1b5) deps-dev: bump postcss-loader from 4.

item.description: v0.6.7 (2020-09-15) 🪲 Bug Fixes 🐛 purgecss removed the css (ce994ca2) 🐛 fix swagger ui react bug (553c99dc) 🐛 env var not resolved properly (89bf64c6) 👻 Code Refactoring 💡 correct some warning (4606f2c1) ✨ Features 🎸 allow specific service name per file with git (#183) (37c2fa19) 🔧 Build deps-dev: bump terser-webpack-plugin in /rest-ui (#184) (4ba1172e) deps-dev: bump eslint from 7.8.1 to 7.9.0 in /rest-ui (#185) (a60d3aaa) deps-dev: bump mini-css-extract-plugin in /rest-ui (#186) (550508b5) deps-dev: bump tailwindcss from 1.

item.title: v0.6.5
item.description: v0.6.5 (2020-09-14) 🪲 Bug Fixes 🐛 env var not resolved properly (89bf64c6) 👻 Code Refactoring 💡 correct some warning (4606f2c1) ✨ Features 🎸 allow specific service name per file with git (#183) (37c2fa19) 🔧 Build deps-dev: bump webpack-merge from 5.1.3 to 5.1.4 in /rest-ui (#179) (8b2410ec) deps: bump swagger-ui from 3.32.5 to 3.33.0 in /rest-ui (#181) (0da302d4) deps-dev: bump tailwindcss from 1.8.5 to 1.

item.description: v0.6.6 (2020-09-14) 🪲 Bug Fixes 🐛 fix swagger ui react bug (553c99dc) 🐛 env var not resolved properly (89bf64c6) 👻 Code Refactoring 💡 correct some warning (4606f2c1) ✨ Features 🎸 allow specific service name per file with git (#183) (37c2fa19) 🔧 Build deps-dev: bump terser-webpack-plugin in /rest-ui (#184) (4ba1172e) deps-dev: bump eslint from 7.8.1 to 7.9.0 in /rest-ui (#185) (a60d3aaa) deps-dev: bump mini-css-extract-plugin in /rest-ui (#186) (550508b5) deps-dev: bump tailwindcss from 1.

item.title: v0.6.4
item.description: v0.6.4 (2020-09-13) 👻 Code Refactoring 💡 correct some warning (4606f2c1) ✨ Features 🎸 allow specific service name per file with git (#183) (37c2fa19) 🔧 Build deps-dev: bump webpack-merge from 5.1.3 to 5.1.4 in /rest-ui (#179) (8b2410ec) deps: bump swagger-ui from 3.32.5 to 3.33.0 in /rest-ui (#181) (0da302d4) deps-dev: bump tailwindcss from 1.8.5 to 1.8.7 in /rest-ui (#182) (be394122) deps-dev: bump postcss-loader from 4.0.0 to 4.0.1 in /rest-ui (#176) (02c3a189) deps-dev: bump mini-css-extract-plugin in /rest-ui (#177) (4a180f73) deps-dev: bump css-loader from 4.

item.title: v0.6.1
item.description: v0.6.1 (2020-09-07) 🪲 Bug Fixes 🐛 treat non json response from github as error (66aa482c) 🐛 add content type for github api client (8b8d86ee) 🐛 Should not delete repository (1f5a1171) 🐛 Fix variable name (eeea6415) 👻 Code Refactoring 💡 Allow git cache, avoid cloning every time (#47) (10fcac7e) 💡 Remove docker java client for a custom on with Akka (#30) (571b4f6f) 💡 Rename swagger by openapi/specification (#27) (39466a89) 💡 Do not send events for no changes (#25) (0984f960) 💡 Refactor the UI (cf9e1f1b) 💡 Add an id to the service to handle name changes (#21) (e7e2e365) core: move every data structure needed by RestUI (f1d67460) ✨ Features 🎸 transform request on client-side (b22e7ba8) 🎸 proxy servers to avoid cors related issues (17e38737) 🎸 support short and long github uri (#155) (9eccb8fc) 🎸 allow precompressed file to be served (#92) (ea53fd60) schema validator (#91) (4ad62925) neumorphism design (#68) (415f9eb5) Create a webhook provider (#42) (f8f5b979) Add a git provider (55893376) 🔧 Build deps-dev: bump tailwindcss from 1.

item.title: v0.6.3
item.description: v0.6.3 (2020-09-07) 🪲 Bug Fixes 🐛 display content of non json response (3ebc399b) 🐛 treat non json response from github as error (66aa482c) 🐛 add content type for github api client (8b8d86ee) 🐛 Should not delete repository (1f5a1171) 🐛 Fix variable name (eeea6415) 👻 Code Refactoring 💡 Allow git cache, avoid cloning every time (#47) (10fcac7e) 💡 Remove docker java client for a custom on with Akka (#30) (571b4f6f) 💡 Rename swagger by openapi/specification (#27) (39466a89) 💡 Do not send events for no changes (#25) (0984f960) 💡 Refactor the UI (cf9e1f1b) 💡 Add an id to the service to handle name changes (#21) (e7e2e365) core: move every data structure needed by RestUI (f1d67460) ✨ Features 🎸 transform request on client-side (b22e7ba8) 🎸 proxy servers to avoid cors related issues (17e38737) 🎸 support short and long github uri (#155) (9eccb8fc) 🎸 allow precompressed file to be served (#92) (ea53fd60) schema validator (#91) (4ad62925) neumorphism design (#68) (415f9eb5) Create a webhook provider (#42) (f8f5b979) Add a git provider (55893376) 🔧 Build deps-dev: bump tailwindcss from 1.

item.title: v0.5.4

item.title: v0.5.0
item.description: v0.5.0 (2020-06-10) 🪲 Bug Fixes 🐛 Fix variable name (eeea6415) 👻 Code Refactoring 💡 Remove docker java client for a custom on with Akka (#30) (571b4f6f) 💡 Rename swagger by openapi/specification (#27) (39466a89) 💡 Do not send events for no changes (#25) (0984f960) 💡 Refactor the UI (cf9e1f1b) 💡 Add an id to the service to handle name changes (#21) (e7e2e365) core: move every data structure needed by RestUI (f1d67460) ✨ Features Create a webhook provider (#42) (f8f5b979) Add a git provider (55893376) 🔧 Build deps-dev: bump eslint-plugin-import (#43) (46ca3bbc) deps: bump swagger-ui-react from 3.

item.title: v0.3.0
item.description: v0.3.0 (2020-06-03) 🪲 Bug Fixes 🐛 Fix variable name (eeea6415) 👻 Code Refactoring 💡 Do not send events for no changes (#25) (0984f960) 💡 Refactor the UI (cf9e1f1b) 💡 Add an id to the service to handle name changes (#21) (e7e2e365) core: move every data structure needed by RestUI (f1d67460) ✨ Features Add a git provider (55893376) 📝 Documentation ✏️ Write usage doc (06d09b23) 🚀 Continuous Integration 🎡 Enforce conventional commits (f406903d) 🎡 Disable test for tags (0e103a66)

item.title: v0.4.0
item.description: v0.4.0 (2020-06-03) 🪲 Bug Fixes 🐛 Fix variable name (eeea6415) 👻 Code Refactoring 💡 Rename swagger by openapi/specification (#27) (39466a89) 💡 Do not send events for no changes (#25) (0984f960) 💡 Refactor the UI (cf9e1f1b) 💡 Add an id to the service to handle name changes (#21) (e7e2e365) core: move every data structure needed by RestUI (f1d67460) ✨ Features Add a git provider (55893376) 📝 Documentation ✏️ Write usage doc (06d09b23) 🚀 Continuous Integration 🎡 Enforce conventional commits (f406903d) 🎡 Disable test for tags (0e103a66)

item.title: Container provider
item.description: Container provider The container provider allow UnisonUI to discover services through Docker and Kubernetes Default configuration unisonui { providers += "tech.unisonui.providers.ContainerProvider" provider.container { kubernetes { enabled = yes // Enable discovery through Kubernetes polling-interval = "1 minute" // Interval between each Kubernetes API. } docker { enabled = yes // Enable discovery through Docker host = "unix:///var/run/docker.sock" // Host of the docker daemon } // List of labels used by the provider to detect specification files labels { service-name = "unisonui.

item.title: Webhook provider
item.description: Webhook provider This provider allows to directly upload specifications to UnisonUI Default configuration unisonui { providers += "tech.unisonui.providers.WebhookProvider" provider.webhook { interface = "0.0.0.0" // Interface where the webhook server listen to. port = 3000 // Port used by the webhook server self-specification = no // Add the webhook specification to UnisonUI } } Webhook Api specification Here is the OpanAPI specification for the webhook API openapi:3.0.3info:title:UnisonUI webhookdescription:>UnisonUI webhook is a service intends to give the ability to UnisonUI to add/remove services through webhook callslicense:name:MITurl:https://raw.
